response.overview: In 1994, troubled teenager Beckett Brady—also known as Hellhound—discovers he possesses demonic abilities after a life of violence and chaos. after being sentenced to death, he is killed before his execution and sent to hell, where he must spend eternity facing something far greater than himself—uncovering dark secrets about who he truly is.
response.tagline: WHAT YOU BECOME IN HELL… IS WHO YOU ALWAYS WERE
response.title: Hellhound: A Hellraisers Story
